description: Episode-level external validation records for Paper 119. Each JSONL line must be one object with these fields.

required_fields.run_id: string, stable identifier for the external validation run
required_fields.task_family: string, one of the task families declared in manifest.json
required_fields.scene_id: string, paired reset or scene identifier
required_fields.method: string, one of the manifest methods
required_fields.skill_i: string, source skill at the seam
required_fields.skill_j: string, destination skill at the seam
required_fields.initial_state_hash: 64-character SHA256 hash of the reset/initial state descriptor
required_fields.terminal_sample_set_hash: 64-character SHA256 hash of terminal samples used by the seam model
required_fields.decision: string, one of accept, repair, probe, abstain, transition
required_fields.failure_diagnosis: string, one of none, basin_miss, high_barrier, descent_break, contact_transition, dynamics_mismatch, partial_observability, calibration_shift, unknown
required_fields.repair_action: string, none if no repair was attempted
required_fields.utility: number, externally recomputed task utility using the paper's fixed scoring rule
required_fields.video_path: string, path to rollout video relative to repository root
required_fields.policy_or_config_hash: 64-character SHA256 hash for the method config/checkpoint used in the episode

strongest_external_baseline_rule: Among non-oracle methods present in the external logs, choose the baseline with highest mean success, breaking ties by mean utility.
